relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Raised with Messiah, seek the above where Messiah is seated.
Set the mind on the higher field, not earthbound patterns.
The old life died, and true life is hidden with Messiah in the Divine.
When Messiah, your life, appears, glory appears with him.
Put to death earthbound patterns of misuse, harmful desire, and greed-idolatry.
These patterns draw Divine wrath.
They were once the old walk.
Now anger, fury, harm, slander, and shame-speech are put away.
Lying falls away with the stripped-off old human.
The new human is renewed into the Creator’s image.
Old status markers lose supremacy: Messiah is all and in all.
Chosen and beloved ones put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
Bearing and forgiving one another reflects the Lord’s forgiveness.
Love binds everything into completeness.
Messiah’s peace rules the heart in one body.
The word of Messiah dwells richly as wisdom, teaching, song, and grace.
Every word and work becomes thanksgiving in Lord Jesus.
Wives are addressed within the Lord’s fitting order.
Husbands are commanded to love and renounce bitterness.
Children are called into pleasing obedience.
Parents must not provoke children into discouragement.
Ancient enslaved hearers are addressed toward sincere Lord-facing service.
Work is done from soul/life as toward the Lord.
Inheritance comes from the Lord Messiah, whom they serve.
Wrong is answered without partiality.

contemplative_note: Colossians 3 is the clothing of new humanity: compassion, forgiveness, love, peace, rich indwelling word, and every act made thanksgiving. Household lines are held inside that ethic, never domination.
